heading: Record—(Rule)
label: 3737 Record—(Rule)
notes: See Federal Rules of Criminal ProcedurePreparation, form; typewritten record, Rule 39(b).Exceptions abolished, Rule 51.Bill of exceptions unnecessary, Rule 37(a)(1).

References in TextRules 37 and 39 of the Federal Rules of Criminal Procedure were abrogated , eff. , and are covered by Rule 10, Federal Rules of Appellate Procedure, set out in the Appendix to Title 28, Judiciary and Judicial Procedure.Dec. 4, 1967July 1, 1968
